case_title: THOMAS S WROBEL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF THOMAS S WROBEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN. DEFENDANT LAZ PARKING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NEAL SCHLOSSER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,764.09 FILED BY WROBEL, THOMAS S AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WROBEL, THOMAS S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO LAZ PARKING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75 SERVED MAY-06-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAZ PARKING
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
DECLARATION AMENDING CLAIM AND REMOVING AGENT FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WROBEL, THOMAS S
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,764.09 FILED BY WROBEL, THOMAS S AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO LAZ PARKING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-27-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THOMAS S. WROBEL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN. LAZ PARKING IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE APPROVAL TO APPEAR BY ZOOM. CITY AND COUNTY WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF IS REMINDED TO GET A ZOOM APPROVAL BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING OR HIS MATTER MAY BE DISMISSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
